---
title: 'Purse-Snickety'
date: '2012-06-11T06:56:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1796043581158364628'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/purse-snickety.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Purse-Snickety'
---

<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" target="">Home</a><br />
<br />
<h3 style="text-align: center;">
Purse-Snickety</h3>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/logo-12-c3ffa49643fb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="136" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/logo-12-a38ccbff06ab.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: medium; text-align: -webkit-auto;">
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;<span style="color: #c27ba0; font-family: inherit;">&nbsp;For the choosey, fun loving, picky 'purse-on'..</span></div>
<div style="font-size: medium; text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: inherit;">&nbsp;Click&nbsp;<a href="http://purse-snickety.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">here</a>&nbsp;for Purse-Snickety, these purses are only available in Idaho at Sharon's Country Store or by contacting JoJo for more information, please visit&nbsp;</span><a href="http://purse-snickety.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://purse-snickety.blogspot.com</a><span style="font-family: inherit;">&nbsp;. Please come again soon for products updates and current show dates and times.</span><br />
<span style="font-family: inherit;"><br /></span><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0031-66493437b3b1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0031-3b48d3ac9ec2.jpg" width="240" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0030-0cd675badd94.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0030-71dee49b3af9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0029-53261aa6a309.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0029-db4396d88296.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0034-3447b0b16f9b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0034-6ce828c81ddc.jpg" width="240" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0002-c2531ae270cc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0002-f9956a9766fc.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0012-af8e03917c80.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0012-cb52bfadb415.jpg" width="240" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0018-11452578fdee.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0018-1c2fca6051ed.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0030-2292b90ec433.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0030-4c06594e196b.jpg" width="240" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0040-5ff42adfd3af.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0040-596ec382b31b.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0041-c1447cd98064.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/imag0041-20014b88a8a6.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Flavia Wolfe</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe></div>
</div>
</div>
